name: Onboarding Launch Hardening — Unbreakable for Public Launch
description: Comprehensive fix of 38 bugs discovered across the V2 onboarding flow. Covers critical auth cascade logout, domain picker race conditions, org matching gaps, UI polish, and error handling. Goal: zero-failure onboarding for public launch.

stories.title: Cancel polling before reset to prevent orphaned timers
stories.description: Store the setTimeout ID from pollEnrichmentStatus so resetAndCleanup can cancel it. Currently the ID is discarded (line 1499) and polling continues after org deletion, hitting RLS errors on the deleted org.
acceptance: pollingTimeoutId added to store interface and initial state
setTimeout ID captured and stored in pollEnrichmentStatus
resetAndCleanup calls clearTimeout before any DB deletions
reset() clears pollingTimeoutId to null
Polling loop checks isResettingOnboarding flag at top of each iteration

stories.title: Guard SIGNED_OUT handler and delay isResettingOnboarding clear
stories.description: The SIGNED_OUT case in AuthContext has no guard for onboarding reset. When resetAndCleanup triggers queryClient.clear(), async re-fetches can fire a SIGNED_OUT event. Also, isResettingOnboarding is cleared in reset() before React Query re-fetches settle, causing ProtectedRoute to redirect. Fix: (1) Add isResettingOnboarding check in SIGNED_OUT handler using Zustand getState(). (2) Keep flag true through the re-render cycle by delaying clear by 200ms after reset().
acceptance: AuthContext SIGNED_OUT case checks useOnboardingV2Store.getState().isResettingOnboarding
If isResettingOnboarding is true, SIGNED_OUT is suppressed with console log
isResettingOnboarding stays true for 200ms after reset() completes
User is NOT logged out when clicking Start Over during enrichment
Normal sign-out still works correctly
bugRefs: Auth cascade — flag cleared too early

stories.title: Fix domain picker race condition — defer enrichment until domain resolved
stories.description: EnrichmentLoadingStep.tsx fires startEnrichment on mount (line 87-102) with NO guard for hasDomainMismatch. The domain prop is always the email domain. Fix: (1) Add `if (hasDomainMismatch) return` guard to the useEffect. (2) Add hasDomainMismatch to dependency array so enrichment starts when user picks. (3) Fix createNewOrganization to use resolvedResearchDomain. (4) Remove duplicate setUserEmail useEffect in OnboardingV2.tsx.
acceptance: useEffect in EnrichmentLoadingStep guards on hasDomainMismatch
Enrichment does NOT start until user clicks a domain choice
resolvedResearchDomain is used in startEnrichment fallback
createNewOrganization uses resolvedResearchDomain || state.domain
Double setUserEmail useEffect removed from OnboardingV2.tsx
startEnrichment duplicate call from OnboardingV2.tsx removed

stories.title: Add confirmation dialog to Start Over and guard post-completion access
stories.description: Start Over has zero confirmation — one click deletes the org immediately. Also, CompletionStep's Edit Settings button navigates back to SkillsConfigStep which exposes Start Over. Fix: (1) Add AlertDialog confirmation before resetAndCleanup with clear warning. (2) Hide Start Over on SkillsConfigStep when navigating back from CompletionStep (add a fromCompletion flag). (3) Prevent the infinite redirect loop when completeStep fails.
acceptance: AlertDialog asks 'Are you sure? This will delete your organization and all settings.'
Start Over button is hidden when user navigates back from CompletionStep
CompletionStep catches completeStep failure and retries once before navigating
No infinite redirect loop if onboarding_step fails to update

stories.title: Fix org matching — RLS bypass, logic inversion, and always-join-first flow
stories.description: Multiple org matching bugs: (1) Exact-match query in setUserEmail and submitWebsite is dead code for new users because RLS blocks it — replace with SECURITY DEFINER RPC. (2) Logic inversion in createOrganizationFromManualData where high-confidence matches (>0.8) skip org selection instead of showing it. (3) createNewOrganization from OrganizationSelectionStep sets no company_domain, bypassing UNIQUE constraint. (4) Wrong requestId stored in requiresApproval path. (5) OrganizationSelectionStep shows raw domain as org name. Admin approval required for all join requests.
acceptance: New RPC find_organization_by_domain (SECURITY DEFINER) replaces direct query
New users with matching email domain are shown the existing org and can request to join
High-confidence fuzzy matches (>0.8) route to organization_selection, not bypass it
createNewOrganization sets company_domain on the new org
requiresApproval path stores correct join_request_id, not org_id
OrganizationSelectionStep uses proper org name, not raw domain string
All join requests require admin approval

stories.title: Fix double-submit vulnerabilities across all onboarding steps
stories.description: WebsiteInputStep, ManualEnrichmentStep, and OrganizationSelectionStep all lack loading/disabled states on their submit buttons. Double-clicking creates duplicate orgs, join requests, or enrichment runs. Fix: Add isSubmitting state to each, disable buttons during async operations, show spinner.
acceptance: WebsiteInputStep: Continue button disabled + spinner during submitWebsite
ManualEnrichmentStep: Complete button disabled + spinner during submitManualEnrichment
OrganizationSelectionStep: ALL org cards disabled when any join is in progress (not just selected one)
No duplicate org creation possible from rapid clicking
bugRefs: BUG-018 org cards clickable during join

stories.title: Fix error handling — silent failures, swallowed errors, and toast feedback
stories.description: Multiple places swallow errors silently: (1) handleSubmitWebsite has no try/catch — thrown errors are unhandled promises. (2) saveAllSkills failure shows nothing to user despite returning false. (3) EnrichmentLoadingStep timeout conflates with retry count. Fix: Add try/catch + toast.error to all async handlers. Show retry option on saveAllSkills failure. Separate timeout state from retry count.
acceptance: handleSubmitWebsite wrapped in try/catch with toast.error
saveAllSkills failure shows toast.error with retry option
SkillsConfigStep reads saveError from store and displays it
EnrichmentLoadingStep uses separate isTimedOut boolean, not enrichmentRetryCount
All async error paths show user-visible feedback

stories.title: Fix PendingApprovalStep bugs — maybeSingle, placeholder cleanup, cancel button style
stories.description: Three bugs in PendingApprovalStep: (1) checkApprovalStatus uses maybeSingle() but user can have multiple memberships — causes PGRST116 and spurious reset. Fix: add .eq('org_id', pendingJoinRequest?.orgId). (2) Placeholder org cleanup uses fragile name matching ('Test', 'My Organization') that could delete real orgs. Fix: Only delete orgs with no enrichment data and created within last hour. (3) Cancel button same style as primary action — change to danger/secondary style.
acceptance: Membership query filters by org_id, not just user_id
Placeholder org cleanup uses creation time + no enrichment, not name matching
Cancel button uses red/danger variant, visually distinct from Check Status
No PGRST116 errors possible in approval check

stories.title: Fix tab checkmarks — update status for all passed tabs on navigation
stories.description: Tab checkmarks only appear for tabs where user explicitly clicked Save/Skip. When user clicks a later tab directly, intermediate tabs stay 'pending'. Fix: When navigating to a tab, mark all previous tabs as 'configured' if they have non-empty data, or 'skipped' if empty. Also fix: isLoadingSkills condition is always false because defaultSkillConfigs always has SKILLS[0].id.
acceptance: Navigating to tab N marks tabs 0..N-1 as configured (if data exists) or skipped
All 5 tabs show correct checkmark/skip/pending status at all times
isLoadingSkills properly detects when AI-generated skills haven't loaded yet
Clicking Save & Next on last tab still triggers saveAllSkills correctly

stories.title: Enforce input limits — character counters, paste protection, word cap
stories.description: Input limits exist (MAX_ITEMS=10, MAX_TAG_LENGTH=100) but enforcement is inconsistent: (1) No character counters shown on list fields. (2) Paste bypass possible on AddItemButton/EditableItem components. (3) User requested a word cap on objections. Fix: Add per-item character counters to all list fields. Add maxLength to AddItemButton/EditableItem inputs. Add word cap (e.g., 50 words) to objection trigger field. Replace select('*') in EnrichmentResultStep with explicit columns.
acceptance: Character counter shown on all list item inputs (criteria, signals, questions, avoid words, objections)
Paste operations respect maxLength constraints
Objection trigger field has 50-word cap with counter
EnrichmentResultStep uses explicit column selection instead of select('*')
MAX_ITEMS=10 limit is visible to user with clear messaging

stories.title: Fix CompletionStep — dedupe credit grants and extract shared navigation logic
stories.description: CompletionStep calls grant-welcome-credits and start-free-trial in both handleGoToDashboard and handleNavigation (What's Next items). Credits could be granted twice. Fix: Add creditsGrantedRef similar to orgProfileCreatedRef. Extract shared navigation logic to a single function.
acceptance: Credits and trial only granted once regardless of navigation path
creditsGrantedRef prevents duplicate calls
Shared ensureCompletionSideEffects() function used by both handlers
completeStep failure retries once before falling back to navigation

stories.title: Fix ProtectedRoute wrong hook and empty state guards
stories.description: ProtectedRoute imports useOrganizationContext which returns a React Query object, not { activeOrgId }. The org-active check is silently broken. Also: OrganizationSelectionStep shows blank screen when companyName is empty (no redirect guard), and localStorage key inconsistency (email vs ID). Fix: (1) Import useOrg from OrgContext for activeOrgId. (2) Add redirect to website_input when companyName is empty. (3) Always use user.id for localStorage key.
acceptance: ProtectedRoute uses useOrg() for activeOrgId, org-active guard fires correctly
OrganizationSelectionStep redirects to website_input when companyName is empty
localStorage key always uses user.id (not email) for consistency
isResuming state properly reset in finally block

stories.title: Sales Assistant modal — opening animation matching CommandCenter spring system
stories.description: AssistantOverlay has no opening animation — appears instantly. CommandCenter uses a polished spring system (scale 0.95 → 1, y 20 → 0, spring stiffness 300, damping 30). Apply the same pattern to AssistantOverlay using Framer Motion AnimatePresence + motion.div with matching spring config. Also add the custom scrollbar (scrollbar-custom) to the quick actions section instead of scrollbar-hide.
acceptance: AssistantOverlay uses Framer Motion with spring animation matching CommandCenter
Backdrop fades in with duration 0.3
Modal scales from 0.95 to 1 with spring transition
Exit animation scales back down with opacity fade
Quick actions section uses scrollbar-custom instead of scrollbar-hide

stories.title: Bot icon consistency and Settings link in assistant popup
stories.description: The assistant popup header uses Brain icon (violet gradient, w-5 h-5) while the sidebar uses Bot icon. Make them consistent. Add a Settings gear icon button to the assistant header that navigates to /settings/proactive-agent. Match icon sizes to the navbar standard (w-5 h-5).
acceptance: Assistant popup header icon matches the bot icon used in navigation
Icon sizes consistent across navbar and popup (w-5 h-5)
Settings gear button added to assistant popup header, between tabs and close button
Settings button navigates to /settings/proactive-agent and closes the overlay

stories.title: Minor UI fixes — mobile overflow, empty domain text, AgentConfig stale deps
stories.description: Collection of minor fixes: (1) Domain mismatch picker buttons overflow on mobile — add truncate and responsive sizing. (2) 'Analyzing {domain}' shows empty string for manual path — show 'Analyzing your company information' instead. (3) AgentConfigConfirmStep missing enrichment in useEffect deps — add enrichment to trigger re-inference when data loads. (4) Quick Add tab hidden on mobile with no fallback.
acceptance: Domain picker buttons truncate long domains and wrap on mobile
Manual enrichment path shows 'Analyzing your company information'
AgentConfigConfirmStep re-runs when enrichment data loads
Quick Add accessible on mobile via an alternative UI path

stories.title: Integration test — full onboarding flow verification
stories.description: Manual test plan covering all onboarding paths after all fixes are applied. Verify: (1) Business email → domain picker → correct domain enriched. (2) Personal email + website → org matching → join request → pending approval. (3) Manual Q&A → org creation → enrichment. (4) Start Over at each step — no logout, confirmation shown. (5) Tab checkmarks work for all 5 tabs. (6) Input limits enforced. (7) CompletionStep → dashboard (no redirect loop). (8) Edit Settings from completion → no Start Over exposed.
acceptance: All 3 onboarding paths complete without errors
Start Over works safely at every step without logout
Domain picker choice is respected
Existing org join request requires admin approval
Tab checkmarks accurate for all navigation patterns
Input limits cannot be bypassed
Completion navigates to dashboard successfully

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Infrastructure (P0)
phases.description: Fix the 3 showstopper bugs: auth cascade logout, domain picker race, org matching. These must be done first as they affect the core flow.

phases.name: Phase 2: Data Integrity & Error Handling (P0-P1)
phases.description: Fix double-submit vulnerabilities, error handling gaps, and data integrity issues.

phases.name: Phase 3: UX Fixes (P1-P2)
phases.description: Tab checkmarks, input limits, assistant animation, icon consistency, minor UI.

phases.name: Phase 4: Verification
phases.description: Full regression test across all onboarding paths.
